mission.title: podman-container-tools: Podman relies in config on specific qemu version to start a machine
mission.description: Podman relies in config on specific qemu version to start a machine. This issue affects 11+ users.

steps.title: Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:
```bash
podman --version
podman info --format json | jq .version
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review podman-container-tools configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:
### Issue Description

The config that is set up has this line:

    "file=/opt/homebrew/Cellar/qemu/7.2.0/share/qemu/edk2-aarch64-code.fd,if=pflash,format=raw,readonly=on",

However, my quemu has been updated to 7.2.1 and is therefore not available

steps.title: Apply the fix for Podman relies in config on specific qemu version to start a…
steps.description:
[This](This) reverts commit 6b6458916eaa51f0dbbcfeccd740706697697ad3 (Resolve
symlink path for qemu directory if possible).

Fully resolving the symlink to qemu solves some issues for
aarch64-darwin nix with regards to finding `edk2-aarch64-code.fd`, but
unfortunately the fully resolved path
```yaml
~ podman machine start
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Waiting for VM ...
Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-aarch64: -drive file=/opt/homebrew/Cellar/qemu/7.2.0/share/qemu/edk2-aarch64-code.fd,if=pflash,format=raw,readonly=on: Could not open '/opt/homebrew/Cellar/qemu/7.2.0/share/qemu/edk2-aarch64-code.fd': No such file or directory
```

steps.title: Upgrade podman-container-tools to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade podman-container-tools:
```bash
# Check current version
podman --version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/containers/podman
```

steps.title: Confirm Podman relies in config on specific qemu version… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
[This](This) reverts commit 6b6458916eaa51f0dbbcfeccd740706697697ad3 (Resolve
symlink path for qemu directory if possible).
codeSnippets:
~ podman machine start
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Waiting for VM ...
Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-aarch64: -drive file=/opt/homebrew/Cellar/qemu/7.2.0/share/qemu/edk2-aarch64-code.fd,if=pflash,format=raw,readonly=on: Could not open '/opt/homebrew/Cellar/qemu/7.2.0/share/qemu/edk2-aarch64-code.fd': No such file or directory

M1 Macbook Pro has the same issue.

prerequisites.description: A working podman-container-tools installation or development environment.
